name: ERPNext Stock V2 FMCG Fresh Basic Test

parameters.dataJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ customer_name: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.customerName, customer_type: "Company", customer_group: "Individual", territory: "Vietnam" }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_group_name: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.itemGroup, parent_item_group: "All Item Groups", is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.sellWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.parentWarehouse, company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ warehouse_name: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.claimWarehouseName, parent_warehouse: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.parentWarehouse, company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, is_group: 0 }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.itemCode, item_name: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.itemCode, item_group: $('Create FMCG Item Group').first().json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 1, is_purchase_item: 1, is_sales_item: 1, has_batch_no: 1, create_new_batch: 0, has_expiry_date: 1, valuation_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate, standard_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.feeItem, item_name: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.feeItem, item_group: $('Create FMCG Item Group').first().json.name, stock_uom: "Unit", is_stock_item: 0, is_purchase_item: 0, is_sales_item: 1, standard_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.feeRate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ batch_id: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.batchId, item: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, manufacturing_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, expiry_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.expiryDate }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Receipt", company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, items: [{ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, t_warehouse: $('Create FMCG Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.receiptQty, basic_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $('Create FMCG Expiry Batch').first().json.name }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('Create FMCG Customer').first().json.name, company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, due_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.dueDate, update_stock: 1, set_warehouse: $('Create FMCG Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, debit_to: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.accounts.receivable, items: [{ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, warehouse: $('Create FMCG Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.saleQty, rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate, income_account: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.accounts.sales, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $('Create FMCG Expiry Batch').first().json.name }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Issue", company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, remarks: "FMCG/Fresh spoilage or damage disposal", items: [{ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, s_warehouse: $('Create FMCG Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.spoilageQty, basic_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $('Create FMCG Expiry Batch').first().json.name }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Transfer", company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, remarks: "Move damaged fresh inventory into vendor claim warehouse", items: [{ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, s_warehouse: $('Create FMCG Sell Warehouse').first().json.name, t_warehouse: $('Create FMCG Claim Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.claimQty, basic_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $('Create FMCG Expiry Batch').first().json.name }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ stock_entry_type: "Material Issue", company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, remarks: "Vendor claim closure / return-to-supplier stock reduction", items: [{ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, s_warehouse: $('Create FMCG Claim Warehouse').first().json.name, qty: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.claimQty, basic_rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.rate, use_serial_batch_fields: 1, batch_no: $('Create FMCG Expiry Batch').first().json.name }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ customer: $('Create FMCG Customer').first().json.name, company: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.company, posting_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.postingDate, due_date: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.dueDate, update_stock: 0, debit_to: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.accounts.receivable, remarks: "FMCG/Fresh post-sale deduction or claim/rebate fee, no stock movement", items: [{ item_code: $('Create FMCG Fee Item').first().json.name, qty: 1, rate: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.feeRate, income_account: $('Build FMCG Context').first().json.accounts.sales }] }) }}

parameters.filtersJson: ={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, warehouse: $('Create FMCG Sell Warehouse').first().json.name }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ item_code: $('Create FMCG Batch Item').first().json.name, warehouse: $('Create FMCG Claim Warehouse').first().json.name }) }}
